payload.gap_text: Continued paid ridership recovery - Slower progress in reducing fare evasion ($325 million) for 5% lower recovery

payload.gap_text: Paratransit reimbursement 80% share from NYC decreases to 50% ($200 to $250 million)
payload.missing_information: Paratransit reimbursement legislation renewal required; if share drops to 50%, annual cost of $200 to $250 million

payload.gap_text: Dedicated tax receipts - Slower economy / no real estate recovery ($300 to $600 million)
payload.missing_information: Slower economy or no real estate recovery could reduce dedicated tax receipts by $300 to $600 million annually

payload.gap_text: Casino revenue - Timing slower than anticipated ($500 million) in 2026-28
payload.missing_information: Casino revenue of $500 million per year may be delayed in 2026-2028

payload.gap_text: 2025-29 Capital Program - Higher operating expenses and debt service
payload.missing_information: Capital program could lead to higher operating expenses and debt service, potentially requiring higher fares or reduced service
